title: Innovative venture strategies, Zymergen's implosion, Square acquires Afterpay, future of fintech & more
description:
Show Notes:

0:00 Big week for the besties: Friedberg's new raise, Sacks' new fund & more

16:30 Innovative venture strategies: internal mark ups, venture studios, deployment strategies

30:44 Zymergen's implosion: role of diligence, how to make deep tech sustainable, finding frauds

43:26 How personal risk impacts decision making on a grand scale, narratives and fundraising

59:12 Chamath & Jason share Theranos stories, Jason calling out frauds

1:07:36 Financial deplatforming, Square acquires Afterpay, Square's savvy move, fintech's future, Jack Dorsey's unique position of power

1:28:05 New Yung Spielburg banger: "Friedberg Index"

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses various topics including innovative venture strategies, Zymergen's implosion, Square's acquisition of Afterpay, and the future of fintech. The hosts also share their personal experiences and insights on risk, decision-making, and fundraising. Additionally, they touch on financial deplatforming and Jack Dorsey's position of power.

takeaways.text: Internal markups can be a key strategy for venture firms
Diligence is crucial in deep tech investments
Personal risk impacts decision-making on a grand scale
Narratives play a significant role in fundraising
Financial deplatforming can have significant consequences
Square's acquisition of Afterpay is a savvy move
Fintech's future is closely tied to 'buy now, pay later' trend

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss both positive and negative developments in the fintech and venture capital spaces, resulting in a mixed sentiment.

notable_moments.description: Discussion on innovative venture strategies begins
Square's acquisition of Afterpay is discussed
